mod_assess.reason: danger_sign_present
danger_sign_present

No danger signs. Cough present (<14 days), no chest indrawing, fast breathing present (>=50 bpm for 2-12 months OR >=40 bpm for 12-60 months): classify as pneumonia. Also assess and flag co-existing uncomplicated diarrhoea and uncomplicated fever for treatment modules. Flag home care and vaccine check.
